prompts.name: abstraction-miner
prompts.title: Abstraction Miner (Dry-Dock Protocol)
prompts.description: Scan codebase for semantic duplication and propose reusable abstractions — advisory only, no code changes

prompts.name: context-guardian
prompts.title: Context Guardian (Architecture-Aware Generation)
prompts.description: System prompt that enforces reuse of existing abstractions and prevents architectural drift during development

prompts.name: resonant-refactor

prompts.description: Safe, human-approved refactoring workflow with impact analysis, atomic execution, and automatic rollback

prompts.name: test-friction
prompts.title: Test Friction Diagnostician
prompts.description: Diagnose production code design flaws by reading test pain signals — advisory only, no code changes

prompts.name: test-abstraction-miner

prompts.description: Detect Lazy Test clusters in test suites and propose parameterized tests and property-based test escalations — advisory only, no code changes

prompts.description: 4-domain heuristic review of PWAs targeting non-technical merchants on entry-level devices with volatile connectivity

prompts.title: Research and Audit Documentation Architecture
prompts.description: Audit existing documentation or plan a new suite using advanced frameworks

prompts.name: implement-documentation
prompts.title: Implement High-Signal Documentation Topics
prompts.description: Write documentation using Diátaxis, Info Mapping, and EPPO principles

prompts.name: review-documentation
prompts.title: Review Documentation Quality (Rule of 5)
prompts.description: Iterative review of documentation for cognitive scannability and AI-readiness

prompts.name: red-team-review
prompts.title: Adversarial Bug Detection Review
prompts.description: Red-team-style adversarial review finding logic bugs, failure modes, security vulnerabilities, and deployment risks

prompts.name: mutability-diagnostician
prompts.title: Mutability Diagnostician
prompts.description: Diagnose pathological mutable state, side effect entanglement, and temporal coupling — map findings to immutability refactoring patterns

prompts.name: composability-diagnostician
prompts.title: Composability Diagnostician
prompts.description: Diagnose composition friction — type mismatches, missed endomorphisms, ad-hoc patterns without algebraic guarantees — and map findings to category-theoretic refactoring patterns

prompts.name: invalid-states-diagnostician
prompts.title: Invalid States Diagnostician
prompts.description: Diagnose representable invalid states — primitive obsession, boolean blindness, implicit coupling, shotgun parsing, ad-hoc state machines, exhaustiveness gaps — and map findings to type-tightening refactoring patterns

prompts.name: julia-performance-diagnostician
prompts.title: Julia Performance Diagnostician
prompts.description: Diagnose Julia performance pathologies — type instabilities, heap allocation floods, cache-hostile access, dynamic dispatch — and map findings to optimization patterns grounded in the compilation pipeline

prompts.name: verification-diagnostician
prompts.title: Verification Diagnostician
prompts.description: Diagnose factual errors, unsupported claims, logical inconsistencies, misattributed sources, and integrity concerns in documents — four-layer verification protocol (source authority, factual accuracy, logical consistency, provenance)

prompts.name: specification-evaluation-diagnostician
prompts.title: Specification Evaluation Diagnostician
prompts.description: Evaluate specifications across Completeness, Correctness, and Coherence dimensions mapped to ISO 29148 — cross-domain quality gate for software, hardware, business process, and research specifications
